title: Flaky Moroccan Cannellini Beans Flatbread
description: Savory, chewy Moroccan flatbread studded with creamy cannellini beans and aromatic spices.
instructions: In a bowl, combine flour, semolina, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Add warm water and olive oil, mix until dough forms.
Knead dough on lightly floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth.
Cover dough with cloth and let rise for 20 minutes until doubled.
Divide dough into 4 equal portions and roll each into a thin circle.
Heat a dry skillet over medium heat and cook each flatbread for 2 minutes per side until golden and slightly blistered.
Meanwhile, mix mashed cannellini beans with cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, lemon juice, and cilantro.
Spread bean mixture evenly onto each warm flatbread.
Return flatbread to skillet for 1 minute each side to allow flavors to meld.
Serve hot as a chewy, savory snack or appetizer.
